titlestmt.titleproper: Records of the Administrative Services office, New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences21-2-2142
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-09-24 00:02:08 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Records of the Administrative Services office, New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Administrative Services

did.abstract: Records include correspondence and memoranda on facilities and projects, program notes, and equipment lists. Also building and construction records.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records include correspondence and memoranda on facilities and projects, program notes, and equipment lists. Also building and construction records.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Records of the Administrative Services Office, New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences, #21-2-2142. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Buildings

did.unittitle: Construction - College of Agriculture and Life Sciences
Large animal research lab., facitlity program, equipment requirments, reduced floor plans of Morrison Hall
Estimate of turkey cost of the beef cattle, sheep, and swine units

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A. Facilities, furnishings, and equipment (groups 1, 2, 3)
B. Program
C. Grouping of rooms according to physcial association
Correspondence, proposal

did.unittitle: Large animal research facility - Animal Science Research Farm, dairy cattle unit, proposal; specifications for relocation; equipment requirements
Plant Breeding Field House, program equipment requirements
Budget and program report for renovation and rehabilitiation of Plant Science Building
Large animal research unit (Experimental Animal Lab), Department of Animal Husbandry, program, equipment requirements
Greenhouse and growth chambers, phase I and II
Livestock pest control facility; program, equipment list, correspondence, line drawing of rooms
Calf research facility - proposal, prelim. plans
Stocking Hall and Riley Robb, space use study
Dondero Lab rehabilitation, Stocking Hall (O'Brien Lab)
Building plans, Department of Poultry Science
New food science building - space use study
Freeville Field Laboratory; program; equipment requirements
"Raising and Finishing Holstein Steers for Beef," by Arthur C. Mengel of St. Lawrence University; Research proposal; Facitlity requirements for calf rearing, barn and steer feeding shed
Preparation of Campus Academic Plan and Campus Development; instructions governing processing; plant pathology response
Facility improvement projects, proposed; seed potato farm
Capitol projects for Colleges of Agriculture and Home Economics (questions from NYS Division of Budget)
Franzen Report on architectural evaluation of existing buildings
Building program - Agriculture and Life Sciences

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inclues: 1. List of Building Proposals, July 25, 1968
2. Master Campus Plan: Facilties, NYS College of Agriculture and Life Sciences, a Statutory College of the State University, Cornell University - W.K. Kennedy, Dean, Oct. 22, 197? (Draft)
3. Mission of the NYS College of Ag. and Life Sciences - A Stautory Coll. of the State University at Cornell Univ., Ithaca, NY, Sept. 10, 1974 (Draft)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: 1. Tentative Building Sequence - Agriculture, Apr. 15, 1971
2. Academic Space by Departments, Apr. 15, 1971
3. Proposed Building Sequence, Apr. 15, 1971
4. Organizational Structure (by function)

did.unittitle: Lands used and livestock kept - Report by New York State College of Agriculture - S. Rueben Shapley
Comprehensive campus planning - Report beginning with Information of

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: 1. Campus Plan for Facilities, Nov. 1, 1974
Agriculture and Life Sciences Redevelopment Plan, Mar. 1, 1974
3. Policies Adopted as a Guide to Development of Cornell Campus, Dec. 14, 1971
4. Tentative Building Sequence, Agriculture, Apr. 15, 1971
5. A Proposed Cooperative Education Program, NYS College of Agriculture, Cornell, Jan. 1971
6. Enrollment Goals

did.unittitle: Ad Hoc Committee to study 1972 master planning symposia papers
Master plan, College of Agriculture and Life Sciences,
Progress report on implementation of the master plan
Basic guidelines for campus master plan
Long range campus plan for SUNY and Agriculture School
Projected full-time undergraduate enrollments for New York State through 1990
Report of the Committee on Master Planning for Higher Education in New York State
Correspondence concerning repairs in Agriculture School
Cornell - Boyce Thompson Institute affiliation agreement

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: A. List of Buildings at NYS Ag. Experiment Station
B. Program for Ag. Chemicals Bldg.

did.unittitle: Reports - "Facility Program for Greenhouse and Related Facilities," and "Guteman Bioclimatic Laboratories"
Report from building committee, "Space Requests for a New Animal Husbandry Building"
Plant Breeding Field House, H.H. Love
Rice Hall, reports - "Request for Renovation Funds," and "Life Safety Exit Requirements Report..."
Vegetable research farm, Freeville Field Lab

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: A. Freeville Field Laboratory, Report from 1970

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: A. Report, "Greenbelt - Revised Agricultural Lands"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: A. Report, "The Migrant Labor Situation - A Proposed Strategy"
B. Report, "Migrant Labor - Teaching, Research, and Policy"

did.unittitle: Agricultural engineering - proposed greenhouse site - Riley Robb
Food Science - Stocking Hall - and "Space Needs for Food Science" (report)
Ecology and Systematics - reports and letters

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: A. Propsal for Systematics Facility 1963
B. Propsal for Systematics Facility 1964

did.unittitle: Report, "The L.H. Bailey Hortorium - An Assessment of the Present; A Plan for the Future"
Annual reports of the Office of Planning and Facilities
